input.prompt: The shot starts with the referenced product already placed from Scene 3. A hand adjusts, rotates, opens, switches on, or uses the referenced product while the shot reveals one concrete material detail, mechanism, surface texture, or use-case result. The shot ends tighter on the useful product detail with the surrounding setup more ordered than before. Use the exact product from the product reference image. Preserve its shape, silhouette, material, texture, color, proportions, and distinctive details. Do not redesign or replace it. Only change its position, rotation, scale within the scene, and lighting. Use the same character from the character reference image. Preserve face, hairstyle, clothing, body proportions, skin tone, glasses/accessories, and overall identity. Only change pose, expression, and movement.
